movie.title: Nippon Sangoku : Season 1 Dual/Multi Audio [Hindi ORG, Jap & ENG] WEB-DL 720p HEVC | [Epi 1-12 All Added - Complete]
movie.synopsis: Nippon Sangoku The Three Nations of the Crimson Sun : Japan’s near future: nuclear war, disasters, and corruption spark revolution and collapse. The nation splits into three warring states. Former official Aoteru Misumi rises through ranks using knowledge and eloquence, seeking reunification.
